p.c: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { x0 * x1 + x0 * x2 = x0 * (x1 + x2) }(x + y, x, y)

goal: (x + y) * x = x * x + y * x

p.c: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { x0 * x1 + x2 * x1 = (x0 + x2) * x1 }(x, x, y)

goal: (x + y) * y = x * y + y * y

p.c: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { x0 * x1 + x2 * x1 = (x0 + x2) * x1 }(x, y, y)

goal: (x + y) * (x + y) = x * x + y * x + (x * y + y * y)

p.c: function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }(y, x)

goal: x * x + y * x + (x * y + y * y) = x * x + x * y + (x * y + y * y)
a + b + (b + c) = a + b + (b + c)

goal: a + (b + b + c) = a + (b + b) + c

p.c: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { x0 + x1 + x2 = x0 + (x1 + x2) }(a + b + c, d, e)

goal: a + b + c + d = a + d + (b + c)

goal: a + d + (b + c + e) + f = a + d + (c + (b + e)) + f

p.c: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { x0 + x1 + x2 = x0 + (x1 + x2) }(a + d, c + (b + e), f)

goal: c + (b + e) + f = c + f + (b + e)

goal: r2_dot(a, b) = a.first * b.first + a.second * b.second

yy + yv + (yv + vv) = yy + (yv + yv) + vv
xu + xu + (yv + yv) = xu + yv + (xu + yv)

xx + yy + (uu + vv) + (xu + xu + (yv + yv)) = xx + yy + (uu + vv) + (xu + yv) + (xu + yv)

p.c: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { x0 + x1 + x2 = x0 + (x1 + x2) }(xx + yy + (uu + vv), xu + yv, xu + yv)

goal: r2_norm_sq(r2_add(a, b)) = (a.first + b.first) * (a.first + b.first) + (a.second + b.second) * (a.second + b.second)

p.c: function(x0: Real) { 0 + x0 = x0 }(a.first * b.first + a.second * b.second)

goal: r2_sub(c, a) = r2_add(r2_sub(b, a), r2_sub(c, b))
r2_norm_sq(r2_sub(c, a)) = r2_norm_sq(r2_add(r2_sub(b, a), r2_sub(c, b)))
r2_norm_sq(r2_add(r2_sub(b, a), r2_sub(c, b))) = r2_norm_sq(r2_sub(b, a)) + r2_norm_sq(r2_sub(c, b))

p.c: function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_add(r2_sub(x0, x1), r2_sub(x2, x0)) = r2_sub(x2, x1) }(b, a, c)
function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real]) { not r2_orthogonal(r2_neg(x0), x1) or r2_orthogonal(x0, x1) }(r2_sub(b, a), r2_sub(c, b))
function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_neg(r2_sub(x0, x1)) = r2_sub(x1, x0) }(b, a)
